entries.source: A simple flashcard workflow
entries.value: fudud flashcard hab-socod

entries.source: A stronger card asks for recall:
entries.value: ka xooggan card weydiiyaa loogu talagalay recall:

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: waxtar leh card weydiiyaa hal thing. taas waa gudaha ma hide five su'aalo gudaha hal prompt. taas waa gudaha noqo gaar ah enough si jawaab, laakiin ma so narrow taas taas becomes meaningless.

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: daciif AI flashcard dhahaa:

entries.source: active recall
entries.value: xusuus-qabasho firfircoon

entries.source: Add hints without giving away the answer
entries.value: Add tilmaamo la'aan siinta away jawaab

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: AI wuu karaa caawin samee Flashcards faster, laakiin waxbarasho still comes ka yimid retrieval. haddii tool writes cards iyo arday never struggles si jawaab them, almost nothing leh changed. waxtar leh version turns messy notes u rogo diiradda saaran Prompts, kadib makes arday recall ka hor revealing jawaab.

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: AI wuu karaa u beddel rough notes u rogo cleaner retrieval Prompts. taas wuu karaa split broad fikrado u rogo smaller cards, add tusaalooyin, iyo identify dabinnada arday might miss.

entries.source: AI flashcards and active recall: how to remember more
entries.value: AI Flashcards iyo xasuusin firfircoon: sida si xusuusnow badan

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
entries.value: apply fikrad si yar tusaale.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay hal-fikrad cards leh tilmaamo iyo caadi ah dabinnada.

entries.source: Back: "Spacing forces memory to reconstruct the answer after some forgetting, which strengthens later recall."
entries.value: Back:"Spacing forces xusuus si reconstruct jawaab ka dib some forgetting, kee strengthens later recall."

entries.source: compare two ideas;
entries.value: isbarbar dhig laba fikrado;

entries.source: define a term;
entries.value: qeex eray;

entries.source: Delete cards that are too broad or obvious.
entries.value: Delete cards taas waa too broad ama obvious.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: Do ma dib-u-eegis everything equally

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: Easy. Push taas later.

entries.source: explain a cause;
entries.value: Sharax sabab;

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Flashcards waa hal ee simplest ways si do tan.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Flashcards waa powerful, laakiin iyaga waa ma whole study process. iyaga waa ugu fiican loogu talagalay retrieval, eray-bixin, definitions, formulas, distinctions, iyo key tusaalooyin. iyaga waa weaker marka arday leh never understood fikrad gudaha koowaad place.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Flashcards work ugu fiican marka iyaga tijaabi hal fikrad ee waqti, reveal jawaabo only ka dib effort, iyo dib-u-eegis missed cards sooner.

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: loogu talagalay deeper jid, akhri Dhisaha Flashcards hage iyo Dhisaha Flashcards Prompts iyo wareeg waxbarasho. yool waa ma beautiful deck. yool waa remembering badan marka notes waa gone.

entries.source: For example:
entries.value: loogu talagalay tusaale:

entries.source: Front: "Why does spaced review work better than cramming?"
entries.value: Front:"sababta does dib-u-eegis kala fog work ka fiican ka badan cramming?"

entries.source: Hard. Review after a short delay.
entries.value: adag. dib-u-eegis ka dib short delay.

entries.source: Hint: "Think about forgetting and retrieval."
entries.value: tilmaan:"Think ku saabsan forgetting iyo retrieval."

entries.source: Hints are useful when they preserve effort. A bad hint is the answer in disguise. A good hint narrows the search space.
entries.value: tilmaamo waa waxtar leh marka iyaga preserve effort. bad tilmaan waa jawaab gudaha disguise. good tilmaan narrows raadi hawada sare.

entries.source: identify a common mistake;
entries.value: identify caadi ah qalad;

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: haddii card keeps failing, do ma only repeat taas. weydii sababta taas waa adag. isticmaal Waxbarid Socratic ah si uncover faham-qaldan, Tababaraha Tallaabooyinka Xisaabta loogu talagalay procedural gaps, ama AI waxbarasho prompt maktabad si find ka fiican study prompt.

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: inspir's Dhisaha Flashcards waa designed ku wareegsan taas xasuusin firfircoon loop: dhis deck, isku day front, reveal jawaab, rate kaaga recall, iyo dib-u-eegis misses until fikrad sticks.

entries.source: Missed. Review soon.
entries.value: Missed. dib-u-eegis soon.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: hal qalad ardayda samee waa treating kasta card isku mid. haddii aad know card instantly, reviewing taas again tomorrow waxaa laga yaabaa waste waqti. haddii aad miss card, waiting week waxaa laga yaabaa noqo too long.

entries.source: Pair flashcards with understanding
entries.value: Pair Flashcards leh understanding

entries.source: Paste a small chunk of notes into Flashcard Builder.
entries.value: Paste yar chunk ee notes u rogo Dhisaha Flashcards.

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: photosynthesis: process plants isticmaal si samee food.

entries.source: Rate recall honestly.
entries.value: Rate recall si daacad ah.

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: akhris notes feels productive. Remembering them later waa dhab ah tijaabi.

entries.source: remember a sequence;
entries.value: Xusuusnow sequence;

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: Dib u eeg la'aan looking ee back.

entries.source: Strong cards often include:
entries.value: xooggan cards often ku dar:

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: xirfado waxbarasho

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: taas tilmaan caawisaa arday bilow la'aan removing act ee remembering. inspir's Dhisaha Flashcards waa designed loogu talagalay tan reveal-iyo-rate loop: isku day koowaad, reveal second, rate si daacad ah, kadib bring daciif cards back sooner.

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: taas waa sababta xasuusin firfircoon matters. halkii ee looking ee jawaab, aad isku day si pull taas ka yimid xusuus. effort strengthens xusuus iyo reveals waxa still u baahan work.

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: arday still leh si do remembering. taas waa qodob.

entries.source: The second card makes the learner retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:
entries.value: second card makes arday retrieve relationship, ma si fudud recognize sentence. Good cards usually focus ku hal ee kuwan jobs:

entries.source: This does not need to be complicated. The important part is that your review schedule responds to memory instead of treating the deck like a static list.
entries.value: tan does ma u baahan si noqo complicated. important part waa taas kaaga dib-u-eegis schedule responds si xusuus halkii ee treating deck like static list.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: isku day taas gudaha Dhisaha Flashcards. haddii aad u baahan si understand mawduuc ka hor making cards, bilow gudaha Baro Wax Kasta. haddii aad rabto pressure ka dib reviewing cards, move u rogo su'aal aniga ku Trivia ama Tababar Viva.

entries.source: Turn repeated misses into a question for Learn Anything.
entries.value: repeated misses u beddel su'aal loogu talagalay Baro Wax Kasta.

entries.value: Isticmaal saddex ratings:

entries.value: Waa maxay door ee chlorophyll gudaha photosynthesis?

entries.source: What makes a good flashcard
entries.value: waxa makes good flashcard

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: marka aad paste notes u rogo AI, weydii taas si split broad fikrado u rogo kuwaas jobs. deck leh 18 gaar ah cards waa usually ka fiican ka badan deck leh 5 giant cards taas kasta contain whole faqradda.
